title: UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 OUT

detail.title: UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 has been officially released. Check complete exam schedule, subject-wise dates, and download the BDS 2026 date sheet PDF from Pt. B.D. Sharma University of Health Sciences, Rohtak. Stay updated with latest exam notifications, timings, and important instructions for BDS students.

content.text: Pt. B.D. Sharma University of Health Sciences, Rohtak (UHSR) has officially released the tentative theory date sheet for BDS 1st and 2nd Year Supplementary Examinations on the official website www.uhsr.ac.in on 15 April 2026. The schedule covers supplementary papers of October and December 2025 sessions. Students can check the complete exam timetable and download the UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 PDF directly from the university portal. The theory examinations will be held in April and May 2026. Candidates can access the date sheet without any login credentials and should keep their roll number ready for centre details. It is advised to verify all details carefully and contact the university in case of any discrepancy.
Download the UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 PDF here

links.text: Download the UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 PDF here

content.text: The UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 provides the complete schedule for supplementary theory examinations of BDS 1st and 2nd year. Released by Pt. B.D. Sharma University of Health Sciences, Rohtak, this official timetable helps students plan their revision and appear confidently in the exams.

rows: General Human Anatomy including Embryology & Histology

sections.heading: How to Download UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can download the UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 directly from the official university website in a few easy steps. The process is simple and does not require any login.

items: Open your browser and visit the official website of Pt. B.D. Sharma University of Health Sciences, Rohtak at www.uhsr.ac.in.
Navigate to the Examinations or Latest News / Notifications section on the homepage.
Look for the link titled Tentative theory date-sheet of BDS 1st & 2nd Year Supple Examinations and click on it.
The PDF file will open automatically - click the download button to save it on your device.
Open the downloaded file, verify the dates and subjects, then print a copy for easy reference during preparation.

content.text: Always cross-check the official timetable carefully and keep a printed copy handy for smooth exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The UHSR BDS Date Sheet 2026 contains all essential information students need for the supplementary theory examinations. It ensures complete clarity on schedule and rules.

items: Exact examination dates for each subject of BDS 1st and 2nd year
Subject names with their respective serial numbers (Sr. No.)
Time of exam: 10:00 AM to 01:00 PM
Centre of examination: As per Roll No. Slip
Important instructions on answer book identification and unfair means
Rules regarding writing on question paper and correct paper verification
Strict prohibition on mobile phones and electronic devices in the exam centre
Official issuance date: 15 April 2026
Signature of Controller of Examinations
